series_metadata.series_description: These records contain information relating to the examination history of each savings and loan association, including: the name, address, asset size, central point of contact, examiner-in-charge, date of previous examinations, date of examination reports, and related information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain reports until no longer of administrative value, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain reports until no longer of administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
